prompt: What is this, in your own words?
What problem does this solve, and for whom?
How does this make money (or not)?
What makes this different from existing solutions?
What numbers tell you this is working?
What constraints (time, budget, legal, skill) are load-bearing?
Who is working on this, and what do they own?
What are the 3-4 phases from now to launch?
What external things must go right for this to work?
